channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Full Crew
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] KTSHIP - ASAP vacancies - 16 JUL 2026 at

item.description:
Location: Hong Kong
Description:

A Fleet in Service Surveyor position is available for a fixed-term of three years within the traditional shipping sector in Hong Kong. The role involves delivering services to the maritime industry and requires a university degree in Naval Architecture, Marine Engineering, or Electrical Engineering, with a minimum of 2 years of maritime business experience. Candidates must be self-disciplined, physically fit for survey duties, and proficient in English. Flexibility for travel and working outside normal hours is necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Surveyor Job - Hong Kong at DNV

item.description:
Location: QATAR
Description:

Urgent job openings are available in Qatar for various positions including Aluminum Welder, Analyzer Technician, Civil Supervisor, Crane Operator, Deck Crew/Rigger, Electrical Supervisor, and many more. Interested candidates can apply via the provided link for details.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Urgent Vacancies in Qatar - Various Roles at Latest Jobs 4 You

item.description:
Location: Batam
Description:

A position for a PIC Barge is available in Batam, Indonesia. The role requires a male candidate, maximum 50 years old, with at least a high school diploma and approximately 5 years of relevant experience. Familiarity with barge construction processes is mandatory. Responsibilities include supervising barge construction projects and coordinating with other trades on-site.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] PIC Barge Job in Batam Shipyard at PT. EXCELLENT MANPOWER SOLUTION

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for Master, 2nd Officer, and Able Seaman positions on a Bulk Carrier. Additionally, opportunities exist for Pumpman, 3rd Engineer, and 4th Engineer on an Oil Product Tanker. Applicants must be Indonesian seafarers with at least 3-4 contracts in a similar role and vessel type. Valid documents, including the latest BST (MSC 560), are required, with a minimum document validity of 18 months. Good English communication skills are essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, 2nd Officer, AB, Pumpman, Engineer Jobs on Bulk Carrier &amp; Tanker at kingsalmanmandiri.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple maritime positions are available across various vessel types and locations. Opportunities include roles for Electronic Engineers, EOOW, Chief Engineers, Able Seamen, and 2nd Engineers. Specific roles are listed for cruise ships, dredgers, multicat vessels, and Ropax ferries. Some positions offer specific salary rates and contract rotations. Interested candidates should refer to the original post for detailed application instructions and specific company information.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Job Vacancies - Various Ranks at Sea Career

item.description:
Location: UK, Brazil
Description:

Multiple maritime and offshore positions are available for various vessel types including subsea vessels, PSVs, AHTS, and jack-ups. Roles include Crane Operator, Chief Engineer, First Engineer, Motorman, ETO, Chief Officer, AB, Steward, and Cook. Contract durations and joining dates vary, with some permanent positions also open. Opportunities are located in the UK and Brazil.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Offshore Roles Available at OffshoreCrew AS Norway

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for several positions on Bulk Carrier and Container vessels. Available ranks include 3rd Engineer, 4th Engineer, Able Seaman, Ordinary Seaman, Oiler, 2nd Officer, 3rd Officer, and Messman. Applicants must be Indonesian seafarers with at least 3-4 contracts in a similar role and vessel type, possess strong English communication skills, and have valid documents with a minimum of 18 months validity.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Ranks Job on Bulk Carrier Container Ship at kingsalmanmandiri.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Applications are open for various Ratings positions within the maritime sector. Interested individuals need to download the Ratings Application Form and send it via email. Further information on vessel types, contract lengths, or joining dates is not provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Ratings Application at Avin International S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime business administrator is sought for a reputable shipping company. Responsibilities include global purchasing of spare parts, managing transport orders, assisting with technical and nautical inspections, and supporting software implementation. The role requires a completed apprenticeship as a maritime business administrator or similar commercial qualification, good English skills, and organizational talent. A technical understanding and basic IT knowledge are desirable.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Business Administrator Job at HS Bereederungs GmbH & Company KG
